custom_fields.description: read only of email id from Contact Person
custom_fields.label: Contact Email

custom_fields.description: Main contact who should be contacted about this project (customer side project owner)
custom_fields.label: Contact Person

custom_fields.label: Active Phase
custom_fields.name: Project-custom_active_phase
custom_fields.options:
1. Initiating
2. Planning
3. Executing
4. Monitoring and Controlling
5. Closing

custom_fields.description: For Archiving purposes so Project is not selectable in link-fields

custom_fields.description: id to GitLab project. In future could also be initiated via API.
custom_fields.label: gitLab Project URL

custom_fields.description: Link to Implementation Doctype. This should be set no later than phase 3
custom_fields.label: Implementation

custom_fields.description: High level notes for general information
custom_fields.label: Project Notes
custom_fields.name: Project-custom_project_notes

custom_fields.description: URL to Mattermost Channel used for this project. Can change over time and could later be initiated via API
custom_fields.label: Mattermost URL
custom_fields.name: Project-mattermost_url

custom_fields.description: This User is the person who is able to give information about the project when the project_owner is not available.
custom_fields.label: Project Deputy
custom_fields.name: Project-project_deputy

custom_fields.description: This User represents the person owning this project. He is assisted by the ... in case this user is not available the other one is to be consulted.
custom_fields.label: Project Owner
custom_fields.name: Project-project_owner

custom_fields.description: Check and safe to see all fields of Project Doctype
custom_fields.label: Show all
custom_fields.name: Project-show_all

custom_fields.description: Select the visibility requirement for the task in the timesheet record. Choose 'Task is hidden' to hide the task field, 'Task is optional' to allow the selection of a task, or 'Task is mandatory' to require a task selection.
custom_fields.label: Task in timesheet record
custom_fields.name: Project-task_in_timesheet_record
custom_fields.options:
Task is hidden
Task is optional
Task is mandatory
